title: Venue and Supervision of Recruitment Activities Outside the
content: 27 Registered Office. Recruitment activities outside the registered office of the LMA shall be 28 conducted only at venues indicated in the Authority, and shall be supervised by the 29 Department in coordination with the DOLE or the PESO. 30 31
